data.title: A whale withdrew 47,154 SOL from Binance and pledged it, worth $7.98 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to SolanaFloor monitoring, a whale withdrew 47,154 SOL from Binance and pledged it, worth $7.98 million. In the past 3 days, the whale has pledged a total of 134,482 SOL (about $23.58 million).

data.title: ECB wants to build blockchain-based payment system
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that according to Tree News, the European Central Bank hopes to establish a blockchain-based payment system.

data.title: SEC announces creation of Cyber ​​and Emerging Technologies Unit to replace Crypto Assets and Cyber ​​Unit
European Central Bank Explores Blockchain-Based Payment System
data.description: According to Foresight News, the European Central Bank is considering the development of a payment system based on blockchain technology. This initiative aims to enhance the efficiency and security of financial transactions within the Eurozone. The move reflects a growing interest in leveraging blockchain to modernize traditional banking systems and improve cross-border payment processes.
